title: bombax humile
intro: Bombax humile, also known as the small mallow or dwarf cotton tree, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bombax humile include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Bombax humile include infusions, decoctions, and ointments that can be made by steeping the leaves, flowers, and bark in water or mixing them with oils.
